name: Burritos
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can tomatoes with green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap tortillas in foil and heat in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes to soften.
2. Meanwhile, cook ground beef and onion until the meat is brown and onion is tender.
3. Drain the cooked mixture. Stir in black beans, undrained canned tomatoes with green chilies, and chili powder.
4. Simmer uncovered for 5 minutes or to desired consistency.
5. Reserve 1/4 cup of the filling; set aside.
6. Spoon 1/4 of the remaining mixture onto each tortilla just below the center.
7. Fold the bottom edge of the tortilla up and over the filling.
8. Fold the opposite sides of the tortilla in, just until they meet.
9. Roll up from the bottom.
10. Top with some of the reserved filling.
11. Sprinkle with chopped green onion (if using).
